DP.267.0000:
You... You came all the way here
just to save some Pokémon?\f
...Though it’s nothing new, I can’t
say I understand our boss...\f
Why would he let a kid like you
come and go freely...?\f
We, Team Galactic, take all that we
need, and eliminate what we do not.\f
But anyway. You’ve taken the trouble
to come. Let me welcome you!\f
Consider it payback for your insulting
me at the lake.\f
DP.267.0001:
...Gah!
What makes you so tough?\f
Fine... Do whatever you want with
those three Pokémon.\f
Press the button on that machine
to set them free.\f
DP.267.0002:
Press the button and set them free.
Isn’t that why you came?
DP.267.0003:
Our boss crafted a Red Chain from
crystals he took from the three\r
Pokémon.\f
That Red Chain is what he needed to
shackle something on Mt. Coronet.\f
But that’s all I know. Who knows
what he’s planning to do up there.\f
DP.267.0004:
Press the button and set them free.
Isn’t that why you came?\f
DP.267.0005:
Press the button and set
the Pokémon free?
DP.267.0006:
[0103,0000] pressed the button and
set the Pokémon free.\f
DP.267.0007:
The button has been pressed already.
You have to leave.
DP.267.0008:
UXIE is sealed inside! It appears to
be suffering, with eyes squeezed shut.
DP.267.0009:
MESPRIT is sealed inside! It seems to
be suffering, with its tail twitching.
DP.267.0010:
AZELF is sealed inside! It appears to
be suffering, with wracking shudders.
DP.267.0011:
It’s Team Galactic’s sinister machine.
UXIE had been sealed inside it.
DP.267.0012:
It’s Team Galactic’s sinister machine.
MESPRIT had been sealed inside it.
DP.267.0013:
It’s Team Galactic’s sinister machine.
